creator: pgollucci@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: pgollucci->pav

need another -exp? 

The gtk2 line was mistakenly deleted previously.

28 ports depend on this one directly.

cvs diff
Index: pkg-plist
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/x11-toolkits/ruby-gtk2/pkg-plist,v
retrieving revision 1.32
diff -u -r1.32 pkg-plist
--- pkg-plist   11 Sep 2010 13:02:38 -0000      1.32
+++ pkg-plist   16 Dec 2010 19:40:57 -0000
@@ -199,8 +199,4 @@
 %%PORTEXAMPLES%%@dirrmtry %%RUBY_EXAMPLESDIR%%
 %%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm %%RUBY_MODDOCDIR%%
 %%PORTDOCS%%@dirrmtry %%RUBY_DOCDIR%%
-@dirrmtry %%RUBY_SITEARCHLIBDIR%%
 @dirrmtry %%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/gtk2
-@dirrmtry %%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%
-@dirrmtry lib/ruby/site_ruby
-@dirrmtry lib/ruby

Full diff here:
http://people.freebsd.org/~pgollucci/FreeBSD/diffs/ruby-plist-2.diff
